PAYMENT_METHOD_DEPENDENCY_ERROR: This payment method is used by some transactions.
PAYMENT_METHOD_OWNERSHIP_VIOLATION: This payment method does not belong to the current user.
PAYMENT_METHOD_SYSTEM_NAME_CONFLICT: This payment method name is reserved by a system payment method. Choose a different name.
SYSTEM_PAYMENT_METHOD_DELETION_NOT_ALLOW: Deleting a system payment method is not allowed.
SYSTEM_PAYMENT_METHOD_UPDATE_NOT_ALLOWED: Updating a system payment method is not allowed.
USER_PAYMENT_METHOD_MISSING_OWNER: Invalid payment method state. User payment method is missing an owner.
